Short Description: Shawarma Bowl with Red, White, and Green Sauce and Roasted Tri-Color Bell Peppers and Corn over Cumin Rice Pilaf
Long Description: Warm spiced chicken shawarma bowl finished with red, white, and green sauce, served with roasted tri-color bell peppers and sweet corn over cumin rice pilaf for a bold, layered dish with a bright and creamy finish.

Short Description: Catalan Chicken with Creamy Romesco Sauce and Charred Cauliflower and Roasted Rainbow Carrots over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Catalan chicken served with a creamy romesco sauce and paired with charred cauliflower and roasted rainbow carrots over basmati rice for a warm, savory plate with smoky pepper depth and a polished finish.

Short Description: Marinated Steak with Chimichurri and Roasted Sweet Plantains and Pickled Red Onions over Sazon Rice
Long Description: Marinated steak topped with vibrant chimichurri, served with roasted sweet plantains and pickled red onions over sazon rice for a rich, savory bowl balanced by bright herbaceous flavor and gentle sweetness.

Short Description: Blackened Salmon with Maple Honey Dijon Reduction and Roasted Broccoli and Beets over Apricot Farro
Long Description: Blackened salmon finished with a maple honey dijon reduction, served with roasted broccoli and beets over apricot farro for a sweet-savory seafood plate with earthy depth and a refined finish.

Short Description: Our classic high protein and collagen-rich chicken bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our classic chicken bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours with fresh herbs and spices.

Short Description: Strawberry chia seed pudding with granola and fresh strawberries
Long Description: Creamy strawberry chia seed pudding finished with crunchy granola and fresh strawberries for a bright, fruit-forward treat with a clean, satisfying finish.
